response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned entire video (00:00 - 04:55). 2. Observed fan messages and concert information text overlaying an instrumental background track. 3. Listened for vocals to detect any vocal songs. 4. Confirmed no vocal music is present throughout the entire video.
response.global_summary: A video displaying fan messages for Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis's first concert, 'DRAWN TO DAWN', followed by a concert countdown screen. All audio in the video is instrumental.

scenes.description: Montage of fan messages and artwork, accompanied by instrumental background music.
A screen displaying 'Attention for Visitors' and concert merchandise information, with instrumental background music.
Resumption of the fan message montage with instrumental background music.
Concert countdown screen featuring the 'DRAWN TO DAWN' logo with instrumental background music.
